snippet.title: The Kaiser | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The Kaiser is a cinematic short film that tells the untold story of Michael Schumacher’s rise — from his breakthrough debut in 1991 to the defining moments that shaped a legend. Shot with a bold, cinematic approach and driven by a commitment to authenticity, the film brings one of motorsport’s greatest stories to life in a way never seen before.

Created as a proof of concept for a future feature film, The Kaiser blends real historical events with immersive storytelling, capturing the intensity, pressure, and humanity behind the helmet.

The film stars Jivko Sirakov as Michael Schumacher, alongside Kristo Stoichkov as Ayrton Senna, Dimiter D. Marinov as Eddie Jordan, Raymond Steers as Willi Weber, and Viktoria Antonova as Corinna Schumacher.

The Kaiser is produced by Grey Universe, with VFX by Dexter Studios, and is supported by official partners including A1 and ERA Real Estate.

Follow the journey as we bring this story to the world.

Official Site: https://thekaiserfilm.com
Instagram: @thekaiser.film
TikTok: @the.kaiser.film

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Każdy utwór publikowany na tym kanale powstaje dzięki połączeniu mojej kreatywności i technologii.

Wszystkie teksty i muzyka są objęte ochroną prawnoautorską.
Możesz udostępniać moje utwory, ale:
🔴 NIE wolno używać ich w celach zarobkowych,

snippet.title: My Mother's Wedding - Official Trailer (Universal Pictures) - HD
snippet.description:
In Cinemas May 29th

In this heartfelt and funny story, three sisters (Scarlett Johansson, Sienna Miller, Emily Beecham) return to their childhood home for a momentous occasion: the third wedding of their twice-widowed mother (Kristin Scott Thomas). Over the weekend, the family gathers to celebrate the new marriage, but mother and daughters alike are forced to revisit the past and confront the future, all with help from a colorful group of unexpected wedding guests.

Directed by Kristin Scott Thomas

Starring Scarlett Johansson, Sienna Miller, Emily Beecham, Freida Pinto and Kristin Scott Thomas

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Song Lyrics

Aayu russia ton fauj hona yudh jiddne
Khoon naal ghoreyan de pour bhijjne 
Vidhi da vidhaan kehda taalu kalnu 
Sees sidhe hongey guraan de vall nu 
Yodheya nu dhuro jadon haaka vajjiyan 
Tanka vangu aungiya range aan laddiya 
Degh tegh fateh da jaikaara gunjuga 
Sikh raaj dekheyo dbaara gunjuga 
Dj aan te santaan di speech chalugi 
Rani jinda chithiyan dbaare ghallugi 
Ladhi fer dulla jammu taahli naalda
Hoyu jathedaar phoola seyon akalli naalda 
Kamm laye jaangey kanoon sakht ton
Dand ditte jaangey akal takht ton
Kalyug vahno vaahni doud jauga 
Jaffi poun jagrawa nu lahore ayuga 
Hikk thok kehne a sure ayuga 
Dahdeyan dmalleyan da dor aauga........3x

Murh parne te pagga dihniyaa panjab nu 
Har dhoun jhukugi nishaan sahib nu 
Laike daang naal kohinoor taj aungey
Bahron chobra de bhre hoye jhaaj aungey 
Gutta te sarbh loh de karhe hongey 
Drawing room asle naal bhare hongey 
Raj laine jaane saddi koum kinga di 
Bordera te fouj hoyu nihang singha di 
Oye boond v ni dinde vicho sadde paaniya 
Har banda kanth karu panj baaniya 
Pairan thalle choudra jwani middugi 
Ghro ghri chulleya te degh rijjugi 
Jagngey chehre anna jor ayuga
Ik do ni khalsa crore auga 
Kyunki ajj de sme di vaddi lorh ayuga 
Dahdeyan dmalleyan da daur ayuga .....3x 

O do ghari dekh jihnu sher darje 
Honey kadd kirdaar naluye de argey 
Hun jadon hoyi honi jang end di 
Parhke turangey vaar banda singh di 
Jis vele yudh da biggal gajj geya 
Os wele dsangey ki time vajgeya
Hr maa da putt urha joorha sahmbuga 
Kesri te rang neela goorha sambhuga 
Aayu oho time jehda mitt hunda si 
Goreya de tera sadda ik hunda si 
Raj hona sadda saddey rule hongey 
Sikhi de sidhanta te school hongey 
Kdo kiwe hoya si birth dsangey 
Asal akali de arth dsangey 
Murhpey ghara nu jadon putt morhe te 
Din charey kharkhra firu ghorey te 
.........

O nwe munde jadon kissa kaav parhgey 
Jamngey fer jagge jeoney varge
Raggi dhadhi jadon sikh raj goungey 
Charhtey de potrey jhe yaad aungey 
Kisse parsang lohri maghi sunage 
Deya singh dilbar dhadi sunage 
Sukhe jinde yodheya de mele laawage 
Bhai nirmal choley ali jaggo gawangey 
Raja oh nikamma jihda raj na rawe
Kaum kaahdi jihda raaj bhaag na rwe
Aisa jang dhillon likhi ke anand a jwe 
Sunke sareero looyi kandeya jwe 
Hor kinne likhngey tenu dekhke
Rakh tu purhainiya kalam ret ke 
Sach jadon likhe ithihaas hongey 
Fer asal azadi de ehsaas hongey 
Pata lagju smey nu koohni morh ayuga 
Dekhi hathi ali turya oh tor ayuga 
Jehda khalsa a raj o pure ayuga ......
